notableEvents.label: Luis Arraez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis Arraez grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Willy Adames out at 2nd. Luis Arraez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Susac pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Susac grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Jung Hoo Lee to 3rd. Heliot Ramos out at 2nd. Daniel Susac out at 1st.
